summary: Seeded numerical-embeddings (PLE/Periodic/PLR), tabular-transformers (FT-Transformer feature tokenizer), categorical-high-cardinality (entity embeddings). 35 nodes/31 edges. 5 routes still unexplored. Contract PASS.

Opened temporal-feature-tokenization (PatchTST) and feature-interaction-selection (AutoInt); added GBDT-still-wins challenge paper under tabular-transformers. 56 nodes/57 edges. Collation overrode 3 contradictory edges. Contract PASS.

Added TabPFN-v2 (foundation-models route opened), Temporal Fusion Transformer (2nd temporal work), DCN-V2 (2nd interaction work). 75 nodes/83 edges. 6/8 routes explored; llm-serialization + discretization-vq remain. NOTE: collation agent wrote cycle.txt (single-writer drift); re-asserted by orchestrator. Contract PASS.

Added CARTE (foundation/graph-attention table encoder), TIGER RQ-VAE Semantic IDs (discretization-vq opened), iTransformer (3rd temporal work). 95 nodes/116 edges. 7/8 routes explored; only llm-tabular-serialization remains. cycle.txt drift re-asserted. Contract PASS.

Added TabLLM (llm-serialization route opened - all 8 routes now active), TabICL + TabICL-v2 (foundation-models, 4 paradigms now). 110 nodes/147 edges. Recorded TabLLM-vs-numeric-embeddings contradiction after refute-check. Contract PASS.

Added SAINT (intersample row-attention), TabArena (benchmark; FM wins bounded <=500 feats, temporal excluded), high-card string-categorical encoding (MinHash, vocabulary-free). 124 nodes/172 edges. 18 works, all routes active. Contract PASS.
